go-task-runner.summary: A CLI tool to run JSON-defined tasks with simple interval scheduling, designed for small homelab workflows.
facts: It simplifies task automation and scheduling for users who need to run repetitive tasks without manual intervention.
go-task-runner.role: Contributed 30% of the codebase, adding 120 lines across 7 files over 7 active days.

personal-portfolio-site.summary: A lightweight static portfolio site highlighting projects, skills, and coursework.
facts: Users can easily showcase their projects, skills, and coursework on a single, accessible page.
personal-portfolio-site.role: Sole developer, adding 110 lines across 6 files over 21 active days.

sensor-fleet-backend.summary: A web API service for ingesting IoT sensor readings with in-memory storage and health checks.
facts: The project provides a reliable and efficient way to manage and analyze sensor data, enabling users to monitor and respond to sensor anomalies.
Using FastAPI for building the web API
Implementing in-memory storage for sensor data
sensor-fleet-backend.role: Contributed 43% of the codebase, adding 96 lines across 7 files over 10 active days.

infra-terraform.summary: Terraform configuration for a small app stack, including VPC, subnets, and an app module with S3 logging bucket, designed for study/demo environments.
facts: This project provides a structured way to manage infrastructure using Terraform, which is beneficial for developers and IT professionals who need to quickly set up and manage cloud resources.
Use of Terraform for infrastructure management
Modular design with separate modules for VPC, subnets, and app
infra-terraform.role: Contributed 30% of the codebase, adding 111 lines across 6 files over 7 active days.

algorithms-toolkit.summary: A Python CLI tool for performing classic algorithms like BFS, DFS, and binary search on small datasets.
facts: It helps software developers and interviewers quickly test and verify their algorithm implementations.
The project uses Python's argparse module to handle command-line arguments.
It includes a load_graph function to parse graph data from a file.
algorithms-toolkit.role: Sole developer, adding 162 lines across 8 files over 18 active days.

java-chat-service.summary: A tiny HTTP chat service using Java's built-in HttpServer to store and expose messages in memory.
facts: Provides a simple, lightweight chat service for users to communicate with each other.
Exposes RESTful endpoints for health checks, message retrieval, and sending new messages
Validates incoming messages for empty text
Uses Java's built-in HttpServer for handling HTTP requests
Stores messages in a synchronized list to ensure thread safety
java-chat-service.role: Contributed 30% of the codebase, adding 130 lines across 5 files over 7 active days.

campus-navigation-api.summary: A TypeScript Express API for campus pathfinding and schedule-aware routing, providing endpoints for health, building listings, and shortest-path calculations.
facts: Users can find the shortest path between buildings, check building schedules, and understand campus connectivity.
TypeScript and Express frameworks used for building the API
Graph data structure implemented for pathfinding
campus-navigation-api.role: Contributed 36% of the codebase, adding 194 lines across 10 files over 9 active days.

ml-lab-notebooks.summary: A library of machine learning experiments and utilities for data analysis and regression tasks.
facts: Provides a collection of tools for data preprocessing, model training, and evaluation, which can be used by data scientists and researchers.
Linear regression and logistic regression experiments
Uses the Pandas library for data manipulation and the Scikit-learn library for machine learning models
Includes a simple train/test split function for data splitting
ml-lab-notebooks.role: Contributed 32% of the codebase, adding 71 lines across 8 files over 7 active days.
